text: {"type":"thought","data":"I love the direction you're taking with this—going for a cyber-organic \"Neon Drift\" aesthetic with low-poly geometric ships and crystal enemies sounds way fresher than the classic Gradius look."}
{"type":"thought","data":" The 3D side-scroller concept with perspective camera is a smart pivot from pure 2D, and using Three."}
{"type":"thought","data":"170 via importmap/CDN is perfect for a static site that needs to work from any subdirectory."}
{"type":"thought","data":"\n\nLet me help you get this built out cleanly."}
{"type":"thought","data":" Since you're starting from an empty repo, I'll give you a complete starter structure with the key files already wired up."}
{"type":"thought","data":"I see the issue with the lives counter—starting at 3 lives actually gives you 4 hulls (initial + 3 respawns), which feels too generous."}
{"type":"thought","data":" Let me adjust it to start at 2 lives (3 ships total) so the game ends after the third death."}
{"type":"thought","data":"\n\nAlso, the enemy cleanup logic looks solid—marking dead and letting updateEnemies handle splicing is the right approach."}
{"type":"thought","data":"Thanks for the heads-up on the killEnemy and wave logic — I see how the dead-enemy cleanup in `updateEnemies` and the `!this."}
{"type":"thought","data":"boss` guard in the wave-clear condition keep things tidy."}
{"type":"thought","data":" The double-remove risk you mentioned is already handled cleanly, and the boss-wave timing looks solid too."}
{"type":"thought","data":"Got it — I see the issue with `killEnemy` not removing the enemy from the array when called mid-loop."}
{"type":"thought","data":" I'll fix that right away, along with the WebGL error handler and a couple more polish touches."}
{"type":"thought","data":" Also making sure fonts are local and checking the ES module check."}
{"type":"thought","data":"\n\nLet me wrap the WebGL init in try/catch and add a nice fallback message."}
{"type":"thought","data":" Also adding a bit more juice with vignette and improving difficulty curve."}
{"type":"thought","data":"\n\nOne thing: the wave clear logic is broken because ambient spawns keep adding enemies."}
{"type":"thought","data":" I'll restructure the wave system to have a scripted phase followed by ambient for a set time, then wait for clear."}
{"type":"thought","data":"The bug is in the wave-clear logic when a boss dies."}
{"type":"thought","data":"wave % 5 === 0` is evaluated **after** the boss has already been killed, but the `waveDone` flag is still being set based on the old state of `this."}
